woodbury.name: social-scheduler
woodbury.description: Schedule and automate social media posting via browser automation

SOCIAL_SCHEDULER_WEB_URL.description: URL of the scheduler web UI (default: http://localhost:3001)

SOCIAL_SCHEDULER_APP_DIR.description: Path to the social-scheduler Next.js app directory (auto-detected if in standard location)

SOCIAL_SCHEDULER_PORT.description: Port for the scheduler web app (default: 3001)

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for text generation (shared with Woodbury)

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Gemini API key for image generation
